pp-model-diagram.text:
classDiagram
  class DetectedCondition {
    <<object>>
    #string condition_id
    #string name
    #number confidence
    #string severity (enum:mild,moderate,severe)
    +string[]? features
    #string zone
  }
  class SkinZone {
    <<object>>
    +string? zone
    +string? primary_concern
    +string? severity (enum:mild,moderate,severe)
    +number? confidence
  }
  class QualityAssessment {
    <<object>>
    +boolean? face_detected
    +number? blur_score
    +number? lighting_score
  }
  class ScanRequest {
    <<object>>
    #DetectedCondition[] conditions
    #integer skin_tone
    #integer fitzpatrick_type
    #string capture_method (enum:camera,gallery)
    +SkinZone[]? skin_zones
    +QualityAssessment? quality_assessment
  }
  ScanRequest *-- DetectedCondition : conditions 0..*
  ScanRequest *-- SkinZone : skin_zones 0..*
  ScanRequest *-- QualityAssessment : quality_assessment
